info.title: NeuronSearchLab Platform API
info.description: Control-plane API for the NeuronSearchLab console: contexts, rules, pipelines, models, training, analytics, and tenant administration.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Item search, item details, and metadata key listings.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Event types, training templates, and event value configuration.

tags.name: Contexts
tags.description: Recommendation contexts and active model resolution.

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Stripe billing portal and plan changes.

post.description: Promote, deprecate, or retire a model family version.

get.description: Server-sent events stream of live log lines.
Pass either request_id (preferred) or user_id + context_id + item_id.

post.description: Creates a Stripe billing portal session and returns the redirect URL.

bearerAuth.description: Platform API key issued from Console > Platform API Keys. Format: nsl_<prefix>_<token>.
